const payload = $input.first().json.body; const subject = payload.subject_line || 'The Edit — Maison Beaute'; const preview = payload.preview_text || ''; const body = payload.body || ''; const cta = payload.cta || 'Explore the collection'; const newProducts = payload.new_products || []; const recipient = payload.recipient || 'carolinanami@gmail.com'; const month = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {month:'long', year:'numeric'}).toUpperCase(); const PRODUCT_MAP = { 'lancome': { name: 'Lancome Lip Idole JuicyTreat', sku: 'WI-000002100', subtitle: 'No. 90 Berry Bisou · 8.5ml', badge: 'MAKE-UP', img: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/carolinanami-max/Final-Project-Maison-Beaute-Carolina-Nami/main/data/sku_lancome_90_berry_bisou_WI-000002100_1-xlarge.webp' }, 'la mer': { name: 'La Mer The Treatment Lotion', sku: 'WI-000000148', subtitle: '100ml · Miracle Broth', badge: 'SKIN-CARE', img: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/carolinanami-max/Final-Project-Maison-Beaute-Carolina-Nami/main/data/sku_la_mer_the_treatment_lotion_100_ml_WI-000000148_11-xlarge.webp' }, 'u beauty': { name: 'U Beauty Resurfacing Compound', sku: 'WI-000000440', subtitle: '50ml · SIREN Capsule Technology', badge: 'SKIN-CARE', img: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/carolinanami-max/Final-Project-Maison-Beaute-Carolina-Nami/main/data/sku_u_beauty_u_beauty_resurfacing_compound_serum_50_ml_WI-000000440_8-xlarge.webp' } }; const cards = newProducts .map(p => { const key = Object.keys(PRODUCT_MAP).find(k => p.toLowerCase().includes(k)); return key ? PRODUCT_MAP[key] : null; }) .filter(Boolean).slice(0, 3); // Render body paragraphs from the EXACT generated content const paragraphs = body .split(/\n\n+/) .filter(p => p.trim()) .map((p, i) => { const clean = p.trim().replace(/\*([^*]+)\*/g, '$1'); return i === 0 ?
